title: Crisp Slovakian Masarepa Wrap
description: A flavorful and crispy Slovakian-inspired flatbread wrap filled with savory masarepa.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine masarepa, crushed crisp, Slovakian paprika, and salt.
Gradually add in water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten into a disk.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Cook each flatbread for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Serve each flatbread in a large wrap, topped with additional crushed crisp if desired.
